'''âb-h-v''' ('''bahava''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:chaulk|chaulk]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-h-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chaulk|chaulk]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âb-h-v
|-
! Lemma
| bahava
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bahavithi|bahavithi]] || [[word:bahaviji|bahaviji]] || [[word:bahavishi|bahavishi]] || [[word:bahavi|bahavi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:bahavuthuth|bahavuthuth]] || [[word:bahavujuj|bahavujuj]] || [[word:bahavushush|bahavushush]] || [[word:bahav|bahav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:bahavuthu|bahavuthu]] || [[word:bahavuju|bahavuju]] || [[word:bahavushu|bahavushu]] || [[word:bahavu|bahavu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:bahavufuth|bahavufuth]] || [[word:bahavufuj|bahavufuj]] || [[word:bahavufush|bahavufush]] || [[word:bahavuf|bahavuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bahavethe|bahavethe]] || [[word:bahaveje|bahaveje]] || [[word:bahaveshe|bahaveshe]] || [[word:bahave|bahave]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:bahavothoth|bahavothoth]] || [[word:bahavojoj|bahavojoj]] || [[word:bahavoshosh|bahavoshosh]] || [[word:bahav|bahav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:bahavotho|bahavotho]] || [[word:bahavojo|bahavojo]] || [[word:bahavosho|bahavosho]] || [[word:bahavo|bahavo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:bahavofoth|bahavofoth]] || [[word:bahavofoj|bahavofoj]] || [[word:bahavofosh|bahavofosh]] || [[word:bahavof|bahavof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:bahavĂŠthĂŠ|bahavĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:bahavĂŠjĂŠ|bahavĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:bahavĂŠshĂŠ|bahavĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:bahavĂŠ|bahavĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:bahavathath|bahavathath]] || [[word:bahavajaj|bahavajaj]] || [[word:bahavashash|bahavashash]] || [[word:bahav|bahav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:bahavatha|bahavatha]] || [[word:bahavaja|bahavaja]] || [[word:bahavasha|bahavasha]] || [[word:bahava|bahava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:bahavafath|bahavafath]] || [[word:bahavafaj|bahavafaj]] || [[word:bahavafash|bahavafash]] || [[word:bahavaf|bahavaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:bahavasha|bahavasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gobahavasha|gobahavasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokibahavasha|gokibahavasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:bahavnĂŒsha|bahavnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gobahavnknĂŒsha|gobahavnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokibahavnĂŒsha|gokibahavnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:bahavshĂ«sha|bahavshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobahavnkshĂ«sha|gobahavnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibahavshĂ«sha|gokibahavshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bahavrosha|bahavrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobahavnkrosha|gobahavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibahavrosha|gokibahavrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bahavmusha|bahavmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gobahavnkmusha|gobahavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibahavmusha|gokibahavmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:bahavsherasha|bahavsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gobahavnksherasha|gobahavnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokibahavsherasha|gokibahavsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:bahavngasha|bahavngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gobahavnkngasha|gobahavnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokibahavngasha|gokibahavngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bahavyasha|bahavyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gobahavnkyasha|gobahavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokibahavyasha|gokibahavyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:bahavyamasha|bahavyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gobahavnkyamasha|gobahavnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokibahavyamasha|gokibahavyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:bahavnĂŒshĂ«sha|bahavnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gobahavnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gobahavnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokibahavnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokibahavnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:bahavnĂŒrosha|bahavnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobahavnknĂŒrosha|gobahavnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibahavnĂŒrosha|gokibahavnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bahavnĂŒmusha|bahavnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobahavnknĂŒmusha|gobahavnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibahavnĂŒmusha|gokibahavnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:bahavshĂ«nĂŒsha|bahavshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gobahavnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gobahavnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokibahavshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokibahavshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:bahavshĂ«rosha|bahavshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobahavnkshĂ«rosha|gobahavnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibahavshĂ«rosha|gokibahavshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bahavshĂ«musha|bahavshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobahavnkshĂ«musha|gobahavnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibahavshĂ«musha|gokibahavshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:bahavronĂŒsha|bahavronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gobahavnkronĂŒsha|gobahavnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokibahavronĂŒsha|gokibahavronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:bahavroshĂ«sha|bahavroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gobahavnkroshĂ«sha|gobahavnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokibahavroshĂ«sha|gokibahavroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bahavromusha|bahavromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobahavnkromusha|gobahavnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibahavromusha|gokibahavromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:bahavmunĂŒsha|bahavmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gobahavnkmunĂŒsha|gobahavnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokibahavmunĂŒsha|gokibahavmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:bahavmushĂ«sha|bahavmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gobahavnkmushĂ«sha|gobahavnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokibahavmushĂ«sha|gokibahavmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:bahavmurosha|bahavmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobahavnkmurosha|gobahavnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibahavmurosha|gokibahavmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:bahav|bahav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:bĂŠhĂŠv|bĂŠhĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hobahav|hobahav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hobĂŠhĂŠv|hobĂŠhĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohobahav|hohobahav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohobĂŠhĂŠv|hohobĂŠhĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒbahav|nĂŒbahav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒbĂŠhĂŠv|nĂŒbĂŠhĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒbahav|nĂŒnĂŒbahav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒbĂŠhĂŠv|nĂŒnĂŒbĂŠhĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻbahav|nĂŻbahav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻbĂŠhĂŠv|nĂŻbĂŠhĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻbahav|nĂŻnĂŻbahav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻbĂŠhĂŠv|nĂŻnĂŻbĂŠhĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lubahav|lubahav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lubĂŠhĂŠv|lubĂŠhĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulubahav|lulubahav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulubĂŠhĂŠv|lulubĂŠhĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:libahav|libahav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:libĂŠhĂŠv|libĂŠhĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilibahav|lilibahav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilibĂŠhĂŠv|lilibĂŠhĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kobahav|kobahav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kobĂŠhĂŠv|kobĂŠhĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokobahav|kokobahav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokobĂŠhĂŠv|kokobĂŠhĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kebahav|kebahav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kebĂŠhĂŠv|kebĂŠhĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekebahav|kekebahav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekebĂŠhĂŠv|kekebĂŠhĂŠv]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
